text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  9 03:41:41 2014
New Revision: 353399
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353399
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353399/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove Author line
  
  PR:		ports/189292
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/math/p5-Set-Partition/Makefile
  head/math/p5-Set-Partition/pkg-descr

Modified: head/math/p5-Set-Partition/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/math/p5-Set-Partition/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:41:36 2014	(r353398)
+++ head/math/p5-Set-Partition/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:41:41 2014	(r353399)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	math perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Enumerate all arrangements of a set in fixed subsets
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 

Modified: head/math/p5-Set-Partition/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/math/p5-Set-Partition/pkg-descr	Fri May  9 03:41:36 2014	(r353398)
+++ head/math/p5-Set-Partition/pkg-descr	Fri May  9 03:41:41 2014	(r353399)
@@ -8,5 +8,4 @@ according to the given partitioning. All
 returned, and the object returns undef when the entire combination space 
 has been exhausted.
 
-Author: David Landgren (http://www.landgren.net/perl/)
 WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Set-Partition/
